problem: Why do lithium batteries degrade at high temperature — ionic mechanism unclear
hypothesis: Photonic bandgap manipulation in metamaterial may resolve Why do lithium batteries degrade at high temperature — ionic mechanism unclear by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Computational simulation with 10 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
